Brand.trading_pattern: Brand has stronger poke. Farm safely, avoid prolonged trades.
Brand.ability_to_dodge: Brand Q — dodge by moving back.
Brand.early_game: Play defensively. Brand wins poke war early.
Brand.mid_game: Use pool to escape. Scale with teamfights.
Brand.win_condition: Survive early, scale to late. Win through sustained teamfights.
Brand.scaling: Vladimir outscales — your teamfight sustain dominates late
Brand.positioning: Keep distance. Use pool for safety.

Malzahar.trading_pattern: Malzahar has sustained damage and CC. Play defensive.
Malzahar.early_game: Play very defensively. Malzahar dominates sustained fights.
Malzahar.mid_game: Use pool to escape his ult. Scale with team.
Malzahar.win_condition: Survive early, scale to late. Win through teamfights.
Malzahar.scaling: Vladimir outscales — your sustain beats his damage
Malzahar.positioning: Keep distance. Use pool to escape ult.

Swain.trading_pattern: Swain has tankiness and CC. Farm safely, avoid trades.
Swain.mid_game: Use pool to escape. Scale with team.
Swain.win_condition: Survive early, scale to late. Win through teamfights.
Swain.scaling: Vladimir outscales — your sustained damage beats his tankiness
Swain.positioning: Keep distance. Use pool for safety.

Aurelion Sol.trading_pattern: Aurelion Sol pushes and roams better. Farm safely.
Aurelion Sol.ability_to_dodge: Aurelion Sol W — stay at range.
Aurelion Sol.early_game: Farm defensively. He roams better early.
Aurelion Sol.mid_game: Use pool defensively. Scale with team.
Aurelion Sol.win_condition: Survive early, scale to late. Win through teamfights.
Aurelion Sol.scaling: Vladimir outscales — your sustain beats his roams late
Aurelion Sol.positioning: Keep distance. Use pool for defense.

Zoe.trading_pattern: Zoe has poke and CC. Farm safely, avoid her Q.
Zoe.ability_to_dodge: Zoe Q (Paddle Star) — dodge by moving perpendicular.
Zoe.early_game: Play defensively. Zoe has strong poke.
Zoe.mid_game: Use pool to escape. Scale with team.
Zoe.win_condition: Survive early, scale to late. Win through teamfights.
Zoe.scaling: Vladimir outscales — your sustain beats her burst late
Zoe.positioning: Keep distance. Use pool for defense.

Mordekaiser.trading_pattern: Mordekaiser is melee. Farm at range, use Q poke.
Mordekaiser.early_game: Trade when he moves forward. Both scale.
Mordekaiser.win_condition: Survive early, scale to late. Win through teamfights.
Mordekaiser.scaling: Vladimir outscales — your sustain beats his all-in late
Mordekaiser.positioning: Keep distance with Q. Use pool for safety.

Smolder.trading_pattern: Smolder very weak early. Poke with Q and farm.
Smolder.early_game: Dominate with Q poke. Control lane.
Smolder.win_condition: Get early advantage. Finish before he scales.
Smolder.scaling: Smolder significantly outscales — you need major lead

Azir.trading_pattern: Azir weak early. Poke with Q and control.
Azir.early_game: Abuse with Q poke. Control lane.
Azir.late_game: He outscales. Finish before control dominates.
Azir.win_condition: Get early advantage. Finish before Azir scales.
Azir.scaling: Azir outscales — his teamfight control is strong late

Kog'Maw.trading_pattern: Kog'Maw weak early. Poke with Q and farm.

Kog'Maw.early_game: Abuse with Q poke. Control lane.
Kog'Maw.late_game: He outscales significantly. Finish before 2-3 items.
Kog'Maw.win_condition: Get early advantage. Finish before he scales.
Kog'Maw.scaling: Kog'Maw significantly outscales — you need major lead
